text.tspan: CoinGecko ETL Pipeline — Full-AWS (S3 to Glue/Athena)
Alternative loading layer: Glue Data Catalog + Athena query S3 CSVs in place
Extract Lambda calls CoinGecko API for top 50 crypto market data
Raw JSON saved to S3 raw_data/to_process/
S3 event triggers Transform Lambda, normalizes into 3 CSVs
Approach 1: Glue Crawler auto-detects schema from CSVs
Approach 2: Athena DDL defines schema explicitly (recommended)
Both approaches register 3 tables in Glue Data Catalog (coingecko_db)
Athena queries S3 data in-place via Data Catalog ($5/TB scanned)
